sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, description) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_table SET description = regexp_replace(description, 'world', 'DuckDB') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, regexp_replace(description, 'hello', 'hi') AS new_description FROM test_table;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE regexp_replace(description, '[lo]', '-') LIKE '%hi -%';
